zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecilia de Ipstones於大約1294年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾易普斯同斯時，她的父親Sir John De Ipstones30歲，母親Hattie Elizabeth Chapel25歲。她於1318年與Philip le Yonge在英國英格蘭素福爾可希頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1350年享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecilia de Ipstones于大约1294年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾易普斯同斯时，她的父亲Sir John De Ipstones30岁，母亲Hattie Elizabeth Chapel25岁。她于1318年与Philip le Yonge在英国英格兰素福爾可希頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1350年享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cecilia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

variants.name: Cecelia
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecilia de Ipstones was born about 1294, in Ipstones, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John De Ipstones, was 30 and her mother, Hattie Elizabeth Chapel, was 25. She married Philip le Yonge in 1318, in Sibton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1350, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecilia de Ipstones est née environ 1294, à Ipstones, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John De Ipstones, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Hattie Elizabeth Chapel, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Philip le Yonge en 1318, à Sibton, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1350, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cecilia de Ipstones um 1294 in Ipstones, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John De Ipstones 30 und ihre Mutter Hattie Elizabeth Chapel 25. Sie hat 1318 in Sibton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Philip le Yonge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1350 im Alter von 58 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cecilia de Ipstones è nata il circa 1294 nel Ipstones, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John De Ipstones, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Hattie Elizabeth Chapel, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Philip le Yonge nel 1318, nel Sibton, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1350, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecilia de Ipstonesが約1294年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアイプストーンスで生まれた時，父Sir John De Ipstonesは30歳，母Hattie Elizabeth Chapelは25歳であった。1318年にイギリスイギリススフォルクシブトンでPhilip le Yongeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1350年に58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecilia de Ipstones(이)가 대략 1294년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 이프스톤스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John De Ipstones(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hattie Elizabeth Chapel(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1318년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 시브턴에서 Philip le Yonge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1350년 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecilia de Ipstones nasceu aproximadamente 1294, em Ipstones, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John De Ipstones, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Hattie Elizabeth Chapel, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Philip le Yonge em 1318, em Sibton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1350, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecilia de Ipstones родилась около 1294 г. в местности ипстоунесь, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John De Ipstones было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Hattie Elizabeth Chapel, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Philip le Yonge в 1318 г. в местности сибтон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1350 г. в возрасте 58 лет.
